Event: Autumn Festival 2023
Event Date: 01/10/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: A24


Other locations the gear can be found
Trade Fair
Maple Wisdom Artifcat

Triggers: Once in a while

Aura of Life takes effect in a small radius around the ally with the least health for 8 sec:
- The target of the ability and all allies affected by the aura restore 3% of their max health each second and take 30% less damage while within the aura's range.
- All enemies affected by the aura take pure damage equal to 3% of their max health each second they are within aura's range.

Requirements: 90-100
